positive: Minimalist celestial whale skeleton floating through deep space, illuminated by soft, cosmic nebulae light. The whale's bones are rendered with intricate, stylized filigree details, contrasting sharply against the deep indigo and sapphire gradients of the void. Composition is centered and balanced, perfect for a repeating print pattern. Use high contrast black lines against vibrant, ethereal cosmic blues and purples. Clean silhouette, elegant and artistic style, vector-like precision, flat graphic design aesthetic, highly detailed line art, suitable for screen printing on t-shirts.
